translations.english: The horses of Skyrim are hardy and strong, and taming them requires grit and patience. Use a hostler's map to find these animals in the wild and mount them, and try not to get bucked! Once tamed, you can register them at the nearest stable and customize their saddles, as well as the saddles of any other horse you own. You may even find the rare unicorn brought back from dead, to right a wrong of the past. (Quest to find a unicorn, "Creature of Legend", can be found by reading "Soran's Journal" at the Arcanaeum. A map to other horses may be purchased at any hostler.)
translations.chinese: 天际的马匹十分强壮，驯服它们需要勇气与耐心。使用马夫的地图可以在野外找到这些野马并驯服它们，尽量别被摔下来哦！一旦成功驯服，就可以到离你最近的马厩去登记它们，定制属于它们的马鞍，还可以为你已经拥有的其他马更换马鞍。你甚至可以发现本应灭绝却因过去的错误得以纠正而重新出现的罕见独角兽。（寻找独角兽的任务“传说生物”可以通过阅读秘藏馆里的《索兰的日记》开启。其他马匹的地图可以在任一马夫处购买。）

translations.english: Found in the wilderness of Solstheim, a tamed Nix-Hound can be adopted as your faithful companion. Nix-Hounds can carry items, and scrounge for useful ingredients. (Pet can be purchased from Revus Sarvani near Tel Mithryn or Geldis Sadri at the The Retching Netch Corner Club in Raven Rock if the former is deceased. Hostile Nix-Hounds can be found in the Solstheim wilderness.)
translations.chinese: 在索瑟海姆的野外发现了一只驯服好的尼克斯猎犬，你可以收养它作为忠实伙伴。猎犬还能携带物品，寻找有用的材料。（宠物可以找雷弗斯·萨瓦尼购买。如果其人已经去世，也可以到鸦石镇的呕吐气母找吉迪斯·萨德利购买。索瑟海姆的荒野中还有敌对的尼克斯猎犬。）

translations.english: Despite being raised by necromancers, a Bone Wolf's true loyalty is earned through actions rather than magic. A faithful companion with a bone to pick, this skeletal pet will reward your friendship by carrying items and boosting your damage against the undead. Quest created by Skinnytecboy. (Quest "Let Sleeping Wolves Lie" starts by reading the "Letter from Bolgeir Bearclaw" delivered by courier after completion of "The Wolf Queen Awakened".)
translations.chinese: 尽管骨狼是死灵法师们复活出来的，但它真正的忠诚却不是靠魔法就能获得的。它是骨头构成的忠实伙伴，能够帮你携带物品、提高你对亡灵的伤害。（任务“让睡狼躺下”在完成“狼后觉醒”后阅读《“熊爪”波盖尔的来信》开启。）

translations.english: Alchemists have always known that the rarest ingredients bring life to the most powerful potions. This is why Khajiit caravans have brought along rare imports from the far reaches of Tamriel, from the Ashlands of Morrowind to the twisted gardens of the Shivering Isles. With these ingredients in hand, you can craft new potions, arrows, and poisons, including the poisoned apple favored by assassins. You can also find rare stones crafted by the Ayleids, as things exotic and foreign make their way to Skyrim. (Items added to Khajiit merchant vendors.)
translations.chinese: 炼金术士们很清楚，最稀有的珍品材料能让药剂焕发强大的效果。这就是为什么卡吉特商队会从泰姆瑞尔其他遥远地方，从晨风的灰地，到战栗群岛的扭曲花园，带来稀有的进口产品。有了这些原料，你可以制作新的药水、箭矢和毒药，包括刺客们钟爱的毒苹果。独具异域情调的珍品流入天际，你还可以搜罗到亚历德精心制作的稀有宝石。（物品已添加到卡吉特商队处。）

translations.english: Forged by Nocturnal and used by assassins, it grants the user the gifts of invisibility and speed. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "In the Shadows" starts by speaking to the Jarl's Steward in Dragonsreach.)
translations.chinese: 诺克图娜尔打造的刺客专用之弓，能够赋予使用者隐形与速度的天赋。任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“阴影之中”通过与龙临宫的总管对话开启。）

translations.english: From the caves of Cyrodiil comes a horde of these feisty green creatures, led by a mysterious "Blue God" wielding a Goblin Staff. Includes new encounters, an ingredient, and a recruitable goblin! Quest by Kris Takahashi. Art support by ElleH. (Quest "Blue in the Face" starts by reading "Letter to Clexius" at The Bee and Barb in Riften.)
translations.chinese: 从希罗帝尔的洞穴里来了群好斗的绿色生物，为首的是一个挥舞着哥布林法杖的神秘“蓝神”！添加了新的遭遇战、一种新炼金原料和一个可招募的哥布林随从！ 任务设计者Kris Takahashi。艺术支持ElleH。（任务“脸怎么蓝了”通过阅读裂谷城蜂与钩中的《给科勒修斯的信》开启。）

translations.english: A tribe of hungry Rieklings seeks your aid to help hunt down a large bull netch. It's not the meat or jelly they wish to consume, however, but its leather. Help the tribe sate their stomachs or save them from their misguided appetites. Featuring the return of Netch Leather armor, including two additional skins. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "More Than You Can Chew" starts by reading the "Peddler's Journal" on a body of a Dark Elf north-northwest of Skaal Village, and southeast of Haknir's Shoal.)
translations.chinese: 一群饥饿的瑞克灵寻求你的帮助，想要狩猎一头巨型雄性气母。不过它们既不想吃气母胶质也不想吃肉，而是皮革。帮助部落填饱肚子，或者把他们从错误的欲望中解救出来吧。气母皮革护甲回归，包括两种款式。任务设计者Kris Takahashi。（任务“贪多嚼不烂”从阅读斯卡尔村西北方海科尼尔浅滩上的《小贩的日记》开启）

agentText:

- MESG:DESC | EN: A tribe of hungry Rieklings seeks your aid to help hunt down a large bull netch. It's not the meat or jelly they wish to consume, however, but its leather. Help the tribe sate their stomachs or save them from their misguided appetites. Featuring the return of Netch Leather armor, including two additional skins. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "More Than You Can Chew" starts by reading the "Peddler's Journal" on a body of a Dark Elf north-northwest of Skaal Village, and southeast of Haknir's Shoal.) | ZH: 一群饥饿的瑞克灵寻求你的帮助，想要狩猎一头巨型雄性气母。不过它们既不想吃气母胶质也不想吃肉，而是皮革。帮助部落填饱肚子，或者把他们从错误的欲望中解救出来吧。气母皮革护甲回归，包括两种款式。任务设计者Kris Takahashi。（任务“贪多嚼不烂”从阅读斯卡尔村西北方海科尼尔浅滩上的《小贩的日记》开启） | SID: 00018E
- MESG:FULL | EN: Netch Leather Armor | ZH: 气母皮革护甲 | SID: 00013F

translations.english: The crossbow has long been the weapon of choice for skilled hunters, whether the prey be animals of the forest or creatures of the night. Forged from the rarest of metals, the Ebony and Elven crossbows represent two of the most deadly ranged weapons in all of Tamriel. (Quest "Night Hunter" starts by reading "Kragrash's Letter" at Ironback Hideout northwest of Solitude.)
translations.chinese: 长久以来，无论是狩猎林中野兽，还是夜行怪物，弩箭都是熟练猎人的首选武器。用稀有金属锻造而成的黑檀弩与精灵弩是泰姆瑞尔最致命的两样远程武器。（任务“夜行猎人”通过阅读独孤城西北方铁背藏身处的《克拉格拉什的信》开启。）

translations.english: It's said the wizard Hasedoki traveled all of Tamriel in search of his equal, before binding his soul to a staff. Through the years this mysterious weapon has changed many hands, as if warding off anyone who isn't worthy enough to claim it. Now, it's your turn. Quest created by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "The Staff of Hasedoki" starts by reading the "Smuggler's Trade Notes" at the bandit camp west of Dragonsreach.)
translations.chinese: 据说巫师哈斯多奇走遍泰姆瑞尔难逢敌手，然后把自己的灵魂附在了一根法杖上。多年来，这件神秘的武器几经人手，似乎会避开那些不配拥有之人。现在，轮到你了。任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“哈斯多奇之杖”通过阅读龙临宫以西强盗营地的《走私者的交易记录》开启。）

(Quest "Once a Hunter" starts by reading "Guard Dossier: Aesrael" in the Falkreath Barracks.) | ZH: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的三件精灵轻甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“曾为猎人”通过阅读佛克瑞斯营房的《卫兵档案：艾瑟瑞》开启。） | SID: 00014E
- MESG:FULL | EN: Alternative Armors - Elven Hunter | ZH: 额外护甲-精灵猎手甲 | SID: 00016D

translations.english: Features seven classic staves from the Elder Scrolls III: Morrowind. Purchase staves with unique enchantments from Master Neloth, or buy an unenchanted staff and apply one yourself! (Items appear at vendors and in chests.)
translations.chinese: 来自《上古卷轴3：晨风》的七款特色法杖。可以找内洛斯大师购买，或者购买未附魔的法杖进行制作。（物品会出现在商人和容器中。）

translations.english: Despite their losses, the Mythic Dawn continue to serve Lord Dagon in the shadows, in search of a new gate, and a different ending. Features brand new enemies, locations, weapons, flora, and a conjurable Daedric Horse, all contained in a multi-layered adventure! Created by Rob Vogel "fadingsignal" (Quest "The Cause" starts by reading the "Stranger's Plea" delivered by courier upon reaching level 46.)
translations.chinese: 尽管神话黎明已经沦丧多年，但他们仍然在暗处为君主大衮效劳，寻找新的湮灭之门和不一样的结局。全新的敌人、地点、武器、植物还有一匹可召唤的迪德拉马匹，一切尽在这次多层次的冒险。制作者Rob Vogel "fadingsignal" （任务“缘起”通过阅读46级时信使送来的《陌生人的请求》开启。）

translations.english: The Bloodfall Queen has had her cleaver stolen by an old foe. Track the bandits to their hideout, and claim the Headman's Cleaver as your reward. The Queen can replace the weapon. What she desires is revenge. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Blood in the Water" can be provided when asking an innkeeper if they've heard any rumors lately.)
translations.chinese: 血瀑女王的砍刀被宿敌偷走了。追踪匪徒，找到他们的藏身之所，拿走酋首砍刀作为你的奖励。女王不是非用这把武器，但必须要完成复仇。任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“水中之血”通过向旅店老板询问传闻开启。）

translations.english: Behind the din of tavern chatter, two warriors are embroiled in an argument. To settle it, they embark on a quest to see who can slay a monstrous spider. Follow their trail and learn what became of them. Includes the legendary "Fists of Randagulf" and the "Ice Blade of the Monarch"! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Caught in a Web" starts by reading "Adonato Leotelli's Journal" in Candlehearth Hall.)
translations.chinese: 在酒馆的喧闹声中，两个战士卷入一场争论。为了解决问题，他们打算赌斗一场，看谁能杀死一只巨型蜘蛛。追随他们的踪迹，了解他们的遭遇。物品中包括传说中的“兰达古夫的拳套”和“君主冰刃”！任务作者Kris Takahashi（任务“难逃网罗”通过阅读烛炉堂里的《阿多纳托·莱奥特利的日记》开启。）

translations.english: From Iron to Dragonplate, this creation offers fifteen gauntlet variants that can be crafted, purchased, or found in the world. Each pair has been affixed with spikes, blades, or horns to give impact to your unarmed attacks. Mix and match with existing armors to diversify your look! Created by Hothtrooper44. (Items appear at vendors, in chests, and can be crafted at any forge.)
translations.chinese: 从铁到龙骨，添加了15种不同的护腕，可以制作、购买或发现。每一对护腕都附带尖刺、刀片或撞角，可以增强你的徒手攻击。与现有的护甲混合搭配，可以让你的外观更加多样化！制作者Hothtrooper44。（物品会出现在商人处和箱子中，也可以在任一锻炉中打造。）

- MESG:FULL | EN: Fearsome Fists | ZH: 可怕的拳头 | SID: 00017B

translations.english: Beset with a jewel made of the highest quality stahlrim, these elegant, handcrafted jewelry pieces combine traditional Nordic design with an elegance fit for a Jarl. Each gem is expertly chosen for its purity, color, and magical affinity. The ornate setting is made of the finest quicksilver that is guaranteed to retain its finish. Choose from three craftable options including a Nordic amulet, ring, or circlet, and travel the holds of Skyrim with style and grace. (Quest "Nordic Jewelry" starts by reading the "Certificate of Authenticity" obtained if you buy Nordic jewelry from Madesi, Bersi Honey-Hand, Endarie, or Belethor.)
translations.chinese: 这些优雅的珠宝首饰都是用上好的宝石手工打造，结合了传统诺德设计，彰显贵族气质。每颗宝石都根据纯度、色泽和魔力精心挑选，再镶嵌到最好的水银当中，保留其完整。现在你可以打造包括诺德护符、头环和戒指在内的三款首饰，用最优雅的方式游历天际。 （在玛德希、“甜手”波西、恩达蕊或贝莱托尔处购买诺德首饰后，将获得《鉴定证书》，阅读后开启任务“诺德首饰”。）

translations.english: Adorn the armor of the Spell Knight, the Keepers of the Crypt of Hearts, renowned throughout High Rock for their bravery and valor. Learn the story of the Spell Knight whose heart was stolen by a witch and obtain the armor that was their standard. The Spell Knight Armor comes in three variants, including iron, steel, and ebony! Creation by ElleH. Quest by Kris Takahashi (Quest "Crypt of the Heart" starts by reading "Crypt of the Heart - Draft" at the Silver-Blood Inn in Markarth.)
translations.chinese: 新增法咒骑士的护甲。他们是心之墓穴的守护者，因英勇无畏闻名高岩。了解被女巫偷去心脏的法咒骑士的故事，获得他们的制式盔甲。法咒骑士护甲有三种款式，包括铁制、钢制和黑檀！制作者ElleH。任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“心之墓穴”通过阅读马卡斯城银血旅店的《心之墓穴-草稿》开启。）

translations.english: Connect with a network of Redguard agents known as the Remnants, and help them recover one of their own from the Thalmor. Includes a brand new set of light armor plus two new weapons, such as the legendary Yokudan sword Boneshaver! Created by ElleH and Jose McCallum "Shoeburglar." (Quest "Interception" starts by talking to Azadi in Shor's Stone far north of Riften.)
translations.chinese: 添加了一个红卫人特工组织“残余者”，帮助他们从梭默手中解救战友。包含一套全新的轻甲和两种新武器，其中还有传说中的尤库达宝剑“剔骨者”！制作者ElleH和Jose McCallum "Shoeburglar"。（任务“劫刑车”通过与裂谷城北面的舒尔之石的阿扎迪交谈开启。）

translations.english: Tundra Homestead provides a cozy cottage just outside Whiterun. Complete with crafting stations and fully furnished, this home is a quiet getaway from adventuring. Full support for spouses and adopted children included. Created by Elianora. (Home outside the city is purchased from the Jarl's Steward in Dragonsreach.)
translations.chinese: 苔原宅邸的舒适小屋就在白漫城外。各种工作台和家具一应俱全。适合在冒险归来享受一番宁静时光。支持配偶与领养子女入住。制作者Elianora。（城外的宅邸可以从龙临宫领主总管处购买。）

translations.english: Deep in the heart of Hjaalmarch lies a tower of unknown provenance. Legends say it was a home and hearth, an exquisitely decorated residence built by mages who defected from the College of Winterhold. But whatever its secrets, the truth can only be known by finding a way in. Created by Elianora. (Quest "Myrwatch" starts by traveling to the tower east of Morthal, and reading "Hans's Journal" nearby.)
translations.chinese: 希雅陲的腹地深处有一座来历不明的塔楼。传说是由冬堡学院的叛逃法师们建立的精美住宅。但无论内藏什么秘密，都必须找到路径才能揭开真相。制作者Elianora。（任务“无量塔楼”通过前往莫萨尔以东的塔楼，阅读附近的《汉斯的日记》开启。）

translations.english: A thief does not fear the dark, for they call the shadows home. Shadowfoot Sanctum is a brand new player domicile nestled in the dark underbelly of the Riften Ratways. With a secret sewer entrance and easy access to the Thieves Guild, Shadowfoot Sanctum provides both convenience and concealment for any aspiring thief, as well as a secret room to display your spoils with discretion. Created by Elianora. (House can be purchased from Vekel the Man in the Ragged Flagon in the Riften Ratway.)
translations.chinese: 盗贼不惧黑暗，乐于在阴影中安家。影足密室是一个全新的玩家住宅，坐落于裂谷城鼠道的深处。影足密室有一个隐秘的下水道入口，可以轻易进入盗贼公会，有志的盗贼能获得相当的便利和隐蔽，还有一个专门展示战利品的房间。制作者Elianora。（住宅可以从裂谷城鼠道的漏壶老板“大丈夫”威克尔处购买。）

translations.english: In the mountains of the Reach is a grand Nordic hall, built in a tradition befitting the warriors of old. The walls are decorated in triumph, each piece a memory of its owner's lasting valor. Created by Elianora. (Quest "Hendraheim" starts by reading the "Warrior's Challenge" delivered by courier upon reaching level 10.)
translations.chinese: 在瑞驰的群山中有一座气势宏伟、风格古朴的诺德大厅。墙上装饰着胜利的图案，每一件作品都是对主人永恒英勇的纪念。制作者Elianora。 （任务“亨德拉海姆”通过阅读10级时信使送来的《战士的挑战》开启。）

translations.english: Perched high in the mountains to the north. This unique player home features several multi-level living quarters, including a dungeon area and bed coffins perfect for wardens of the night. Created by Elianora. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Guests for Dinner" starts by reading the "Dinner Invitation" delivered by courier upon reaching level 12.)
translations.chinese: 北部的高山中，有一所独特的玩家住所，包括几个多层次的生活区、地牢区域和床棺。非常适合夜间巡游之人。制作者Elianora。任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“晚宴嘉宾”通过阅读12级时信使送来的《宴会请柬》开启。）

agentText:
Addon: Update
EDID: Help_ccEEJSSE005
Translations:
- MESG:DESC | EN: Perched high in the mountains to the north. This unique player home features several multi-level living quarters, including a dungeon area and bed coffins perfect for wardens of the night. Created by Elianora. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Guests for Dinner" starts by reading the "Dinner Invitation" delivered by courier upon reaching level 12.) | ZH: 北部的高山中，有一所独特的玩家住所，包括几个多层次的生活区、地牢区域和床棺。非常适合夜间巡游之人。制作者Elianora。任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“晚宴嘉宾”通过阅读12级时信使送来的《宴会请柬》开启。） | SID: 000152
- MESG:FULL | EN: Bloodchill Manor | ZH: 血寒庄园 | SID: 000168

translations.english: In the midst of an unending war, the Stormcloaks and Imperials have agreed to a duel. Two champions are to meet on the field of battle, to decide once and for all whose warriors are the fiercest. Choose a side, don the armor of the champion, and prove your mettle. Created by Borja "Borx25" Franco. Quest created by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Battle of the Champions" starts by reading "Battle of Champions" at The Drunken Huntsman in Whiterun or waiting for a letter from a commanding officer.)
translations.chinese: 在无休无止的战争中，风暴斗篷和帝国同意举行一场决斗。两位冠军相约于战场，看看哪家的战士更为勇猛。选择一方阵营，穿上冠军盔甲，去证明你的勇气吧。制作者"Borx25" Franco。任务设计Kris Takahashi。 (任务“冠军之战”通过在白漫城的醉猎户阅读《冠军之战》开启，或等待相应阵营指挥官来信。)

translations.english: Available now at the Fletcher in Solitude, eight crossbows made from the finest Tamrielic materials! Choose from simple but elegant crossbows of Imperial, Orcish, Silver, or Nordic design, or high grade versions of Glass, Stalhrim, Daedric and Dragonbone! Purchase these finely assembled weapons at the Fletcher, or acquire one and learn to craft them yourself! Created by Borja "Borx25" Franco.
translations.chinese: 独孤城的造箭者商店，添加了八种用泰姆瑞尔最好的材料制作的弩！可以选择简约优雅的帝国、兽人、银制和诺德弩，或者高级的玻璃、魔冰、迪德拉和龙骨弩！你可以从造箭者购买这些精心制作的武器，或者学习自己制作！制作者Borja "Borx25" Franco。

translations.english: Don't head off into the wilderness without your Adventurer's Backpack. Craft 16 variations with assorted effects! Created by Rob Vogel (fadingsignal). (Backpacks can be purchased at vendors and crafted via Forge.)
translations.chinese: 没有冒险家专用的背包，不要轻易涉足荒野。提供16种效果各异的背包制作！制作者Rob Vogel (fadingsignal)。（背包可以在商人处购买，或者通过锻炉制作。）

translations.english: In the forests of Falkreath lies a mysterious altar, promising the gift of a single boon. Walk the path that reflects your desire - or lack thereof - and embark on a unique adventure based on that choice. Discover the fabled Bittercup and three separate quests! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "A Dying Wish" starts by reading "Mysterious Altar" at Dead Man's Drink in Falkreath.)
translations.chinese: 在佛克瑞斯森林的深处，有个能给予恩赐的神秘祭坛。走上那条映照你内心欲望或无求的道路，开启一段独特的冒险之旅吧。找到传说中的苦涩之杯，体验三个独立任务！任务设计Kris Takahashi。 （任务“临终遗愿”通过阅读佛克瑞斯亡者之饮的《神秘的祭坛》开启。）

translations.english: Now you too, can wield the powerful equipment of the Divine Crusader, Pelinal Whitestrake - once reserved only for the revered Knights of the Nine. Created by Maty743. (Armor can be found by exploring Four Skull Lookout far east-northeast of Markarth.)
translations.chinese: 曾经只有受人崇敬的九圣灵骑士团才能使用的强大装备，圣灵圣战者——“白轮”佩林纳尔遗存之物，现在已经可以使用。制作者Maty743. （盔甲可以通过探索马卡斯城东北方的四颅哨所获得。）

translations.english: While Stendarr may offer mercy, the Vigilant have none to spare. Among the ranks of these holy warriors are armored paladins who shed their priestly robes for hide and steel. Collect and craft four unique armor sets and deliver Stendarr's justice to both the abominations and those corrupted by them. Created by Maty743. Quest created by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Unholy Vigil" starts by reading the "Letter to Keeper Carcette" in the Hall of the Vigilant south of Dawnstar.)
translations.chinese: 斯丹达尔或许仁慈，但警戒者不会徇情。这群神圣战士中有一群脱下祭司长袍，换上皮革与钢铁的盔甲圣骑士。收集并制作四套独特的盔甲，让斯丹达尔的正义裁决那些堕落腐化之物。制作者Maty743。任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“不洁警戒者”通过阅读晨星城南边警戒者之厅的《给守护者凯西提的信》开启。）

translations.english: The original Staff of Chaos, or Balac-thurm, was shattered into pieces and lost to time. In the years since, mages have sought to recreate its magic. Follow the path of these mages as you obtain an ancient ring and restore the artifacts of chaos, including two new staves and an enchanted amulet! Creation by PrivateEye. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "The Arms of Chaos" starts by reading "Hyenril's Jorunal" at Skytemple Ruins, north of the College of Winterhold.)
translations.chinese: 曾经的混沌之杖（也叫“巴拉克-图姆”）已经粉碎，湮灭于时间长河。此后的法师们一直在试图重现它的魔力。你将获得一个古老戒指，并重新恢复混沌神器！添加两个新的法杖与一个附魔护身符！制作者PrivateEye。任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“混沌武装”通过在冬堡学院以北的天庙遗址阅读《海恩利尔的日记》开启。）

translations.english: In Survival Mode, your greatest adversary is Skyrim itself. Unrelenting cold, harsh wilderness, famine and fatigue - do you have the strength to endure? (Creation can be turned on or off in Settings menu. For details, consult Help Menu.)
translations.chinese: 在生存模式中，你最大的对手就是天际这片土地本身。无情的严寒，残酷的荒野，饥饿与疲劳，你有能力忍受这一切吗？（生存模式可以在设置中开启或关闭。详情见帮助菜单。）

translations.english: Make Skyrim that much more accommodating with this cozy placeable campsite, complete with a lean-to for sleeping, campfire for warmth and some cooking, and a new fast travel marker (Creation craftable via Forge)
translations.chinese: 让天际变得更适合露营，添加一个可供睡觉的帐篷、取暖的篝火以及一些炊具，还有一个新的快速旅行标记。（可以通过锻炉制作）

- MESG:FULL | EN: Camping | ZH: 露营 | SID: 00016F

translations.english: Old forts have long been bastions for the dead, as mortals both wicked and misunderstood have hung from their gallows. Here, a necromancer can find a home, filling its coffers with treasures that suit the morbid and macabre - provided they survive it. Claim the legendary Bloodworm Helm, Helm of Oreyn Bearclaw, and the Staff of Worms to wield the power of Mannimarco himself! Created by Rich Marin. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Dreams of the Dead" starts by reading "Naara's Journal" within the abandoned fort on the northern edge of Mara's Eye Pond.)
translations.chinese: 古老的堡垒一向为亡灵盘踞，他们大多曾是因罪或者被诬陷而吊死在绞架上的凡人。这里是死灵法师理想的家园，只要他们能活下来，就能用那些病态恐怖的宝藏填满宝库。夺取传说中的血蠕虫之盔、“熊爪”奥瑞恩之盔和蠕虫之杖，行使来自曼尼马克的力量吧！制作者 Rich Marin。任务设计Kris Takahashi。 （任务“亡者之梦”通过阅读玛拉之眼池塘北岸废弃堡垒的里的《娜拉的日记》开启。）

translations.english: Forgotten Seasons offers a brand new dungeon adventure featuring work from a number of creators. In addition to its spacious exploration, the creation provides a myriad of unique rewards including a new mount, armor, items, and perks, many of which feature custom art assets and designs. Created by Trainwiz. Dwarven Crown by PrivateEye. Additional art support by Elianora. Additional art support by Rob Vogel "fadingsignal". Additional design by Kris Takahashi. (Search for the Runoff Caverns west of Lost Valley Redoubt.)
translations.chinese: 遗忘之季提供了一场全新的地下城冒险，其中还包括许多创作者的作品。除了广阔的探索外，本创意模组还提供了很多独特奖励，包括新的坐骑、护甲、物品和特殊能力，其中很多都源自自主艺术资产与设计。制作者Trainwiz。矮人王冠制作者PrivateEye。额外艺术支持Elianora、Rob Vogel "fadingsignal"。额外设计支持Kris Takahashi。（寻找失落溪谷据点以西的径流洞窟。）

translations.english: Once known as a day of debauchery, Saturalia has since transformed into a time of gift giving and cheer. Celebrate the holidays with these festive Saturalia garments, and spread merriment across Skyrim on your very own reindeer! Created by Virginia "Steelfeathers" Smith (Outfit and mount obtained from Agrane Peryval, west of Dawnstar.)
translations.chinese: 萨图拉利亚节曾是放纵之日，现在已经变成了互相赠送礼物的节庆。用萨图拉利亚节的服饰来庆祝节日，骑着你的驯鹿把欢乐传遍天际吧！制作者Virginia "Steelfeathers" Smith。（装备与坐骑在晨星城西边的阿格拉尼·佩里瓦尔处获得。）

translations.english: Become a powerful beastmaster with the Skyrim Pet Pack. Rescue tamed creatures and recruit them as your trusted followers. Use their unique abilities to adapt and thrive as you explore the breadth of Skyrim. From stealthy foxes to web-spinning spiders - as well as goats, rabbits, and skeevers - you can recruit the pet that best matches your gameplay. With five different animal species to choose from, there's a fun and furry companion for every adventurer. (Quest "Pets of Skyrim" starts by reading the note "For Sale" in The Bannered Mare.)
translations.chinese: 运用天际的宠物拓展包，成为强大的驯兽师吧。拯救那些被驯服的生物，并招募它们成为值得你信赖的追随者。运用它们的特殊能力吧。天际之广，从潜踪的狐狸到织网的蜘蛛，更有山羊、兔子和恶鼠，挑选最合适你游戏玩法的宠物。五个可供选择的宠物，每个冒险者都能找到那个有趣的毛茸茸伴侣。（任务“天际的宠物”通过阅读悬旗母马的《出售启示》开启。）

Use their unique abilities to adapt and thrive as you explore the breadth of Skyrim. From stealthy foxes to web-spinning spiders - as well as goats, rabbits, and skeevers - you can recruit the pet that best matches your gameplay. With five different animal species to choose from, there's a fun and furry companion for every adventurer. (Quest "Pets of Skyrim" starts by reading the note "For Sale" in The Bannered Mare.) | ZH: 运用天际的宠物拓展包，成为强大的驯兽师吧。拯救那些被驯服的生物，并招募它们成为值得你信赖的追随者。运用它们的特殊能力吧。天际之广，从潜踪的狐狸到织网的蜘蛛，更有山羊、兔子和恶鼠，挑选最合适你游戏玩法的宠物。五个可供选择的宠物，每个冒险者都能找到那个有趣的毛茸茸伴侣。（任务“天际的宠物”通过阅读悬旗母马的《出售启示》开启。） | SID: 000101

translations.english: Rule over the realm of life and death with the Necromantic Arts pack. This creation features a unique necromancer robe with all new enchantments and variants, and 13 necromancy themed spells allowing you to conjure a wide variety of skeletons, apparitions, and powerful creatures, including the mighty Bone Colossus! Created by Virginia "Steelfeathers" Smith. (Items can be purchased at vendors and appear in containers.)
translations.chinese: 用新的死灵法术拓展包掌控生死吧。创意模组中添加了独特的死灵法师长袍和其各种附魔款式，以及十三种死灵法术，让你能够召唤各种骷髅、幽灵和包括骷髅巨像在内的强大物种。制作者Virginia "Steelfeathers" Smith。（物品可以在商人处购买，或在容器中发现。）

translations.english: Build, upgrade, and manage your own farmstead in the heart of Whiterun. Elect a steward to oversee the day-to-day and purchase upgrades such as animal pens, windmills, apiaries and stables. Whether it's building a commercial empire, growing crops, or working with animals, there are no shortage of gameplay options here. Created by Virginia "Steelfeathers" Smith. (Quest "The Unquiet Dead" starts by investigating Goldenhills Plantation east of Rorikstead.)
translations.chinese: 在白漫领的腹地建造、升级并管理属于你自己的农场。选一个管家来监督日常事务，购买畜栏、风车、蜂房、马厩等升级设施。这里的游戏玩法能够满足你打造商业帝国、种植作物或者与动物们为伴的各种需求。制作者Virginia "Steelfeathers" Smith。（任务“死不瞑目”从调查洛利克镇以东的金丘农园开启。）

translations.english: The Vampire Lord Harkon has returned to power. By using the Elder Scrolls, he seeks to do the unthinkable - to end the sun itself. Will you join the ancient order of the Dawnguard and stop him? Or will you become a Vampire Lord yourself? Featuring an all new faction questline and locations, the ultimate choice will be yours. (Quest "Dawnguard" starts upon hearing rumors of the Dawnguard or by being approached by Durak upon reaching level 10.)
translations.chinese: 吸血鬼领主哈孔再度崛起。他计划利用上古卷轴终结太阳。你愿意加入古老的黎明守卫来阻止他？还是自己成为吸血鬼领主？全新的阵营任务线与地点，一切取决于你的选择。（任务“黎明守卫”将在听到有关黎明守卫的传言，或者在10级时被杜拉克找上而开启。）

translations.english: Journey off the coast of Morrowind, to the island of Solstheim. Encounter new towns, dungeons, and quests, as you traverse the ash wastes and glacial valleys of this new land. Become more powerful with new shouts that bend the will of your enemies and even tame dragons. Your fate, and the fate of Solstheim, hangs in the balance as you face off against your deadliest adversary - the first Dragonborn. (Quest "Dragonborn" starts after being attacked by Cultists upon completion of "The Way of the Voice".)
translations.chinese: 从晨风海岸出发，前往索瑟海姆岛。当你穿越这片新土地的灰烬与冰川时，会遇到新的城镇、地牢和任务。用新的龙吼变得更加强大吧，扭曲你敌人的意志，甚至驯服巨龙。等你面对你最致命的对手——最初的龙裔，你的命运、索瑟海姆的命运，都将岌岌可危。（任务“龙裔”在完成“吼声之道”后遭遇邪教徒袭击开启。）

translations.english: Purchase land and build your own home from the ground up - from a simple one-room cottage to a sprawling compound complete with an armory, alchemy laboratory, stable, garden, and more. Use all-new tools like the drafting table and carpenter's workbench to transform quarried stone, clay, and sawn logs into structures and furnishings. Even transform your house into a home by adopting children. (Land may be purchased from the Jarl in Dawnstar's White Hall, the steward in the Jarl's Longhouse in Falkreath Hold, or the steward in Morthal's Highmoon Hall.)
translations.chinese: 买下一片宅基地，从头开始建造你自己的家园，从简单的一室小屋，到囊括了军械库、炼金实验室、马厩、花圃的庞大庭院。使用绘图桌、木工台等全新工具，把石料、黏土和原木转化成结构与家具。还可以收养孩子，组成一个真正的家。（土地可以从晨星领主、佛克瑞斯总管和莫萨尔总管处购买。）

translations.english: Natives of Cyrodiil, they have proved to be shrewd diplomats and traders. They are skilled with combat and magic. Anywhere gold coins might be found, Imperials always seem to find a few more. They can call upon the Voice of the Emperor to calm an enemy.
translations.chinese: 帝国人是希罗帝尔的原住民，精明的交际家和商人。战斗和魔法天赋都很出众。在任何有可能发现金币的地方，帝国人似乎总能比别人找到更多。他们可以用“帝王之音”使敌人平静下来。

translations.english: Citizens of Skyrim, they are a tall and fair-haired people. Strong and hardy, Nords are famous for their resistance to cold and their talent as warriors. They can use a Battlecry to make opponents flee.

translations.english: Onmund has asked me to help him get an amulet with sentimental value back from Enthir.
translations.chinese: 昂蒙德请我帮他从恩希尔处拿回一个具有情感价值的护符。

translations.english: Enthir insists that Onmund sold him the amulet in question, and he will not go back on a trade. If, however, I can recover a particular staff for Enthir, he'll give me the amulet. I'll need to search <Alias=StaffLocation> for the staff.
translations.chinese: 恩希尔坚称昂蒙德已经将护符卖给了他，不会再次进行交易。不过，如果我能帮恩希尔找回一根特殊的法杖，他就会把护符还给我。我需要到<Alias=StaffLocation>寻找法杖。

translations.english: Onmund is grateful that I was able to deal with Enthir and return his amulet.
translations.chinese: 昂蒙德很感激我能够帮他和恩希尔交涉并拿回他的护符。

translations.english: Enthir agreed to return Onmund's amulet to him, and has given it to me. I need to make sure it gets back to Onmund.
translations.chinese: 恩希尔同意把昂蒙德的护符交给我，由我代转昂蒙德。

translations.english: I have found the staff that Enthir wanted, and need to deliver it to him so that he'll exchange it for Onmund's amulet.
translations.chinese: 我找到了恩希尔想要的法杖，只需拿回去与他交换昂蒙德的护符。

translations.english: Arniel has finally revealed to me that his secret project deals with the disappearance of the dwarves, though he hasn't been clear about how his work relates to it. He's given me a warped soul gem, and asked me to find several Dwarven Convectors in the various ruins around Skyrim. I'm supposed to place the gem inside a convector, and then heat it using a spell Arniel has taught me. When I've done this several times, I should return the gem to Arniel.
translations.chinese: 阿内尔终于向我透露了自己的秘密项目与矮人消失之谜有关，尽管他还不清楚自己的研究是否能够成功。他交给我一块扭曲的灵魂石，并让我在天际四处的矮人遗迹里找寻几个矮人环流器。我需要把灵魂石放进环流器，然后用阿内尔教给我的法术进行加热。等我完成后，再把灵魂石还给阿内尔。

translations.english: I've once again helped Arniel with his secret, and very vague, project relating to the dwarves. He implied that he's waiting for something else, and then finally maybe I'll see what this is all about.
translations.chinese: 我再次帮阿内尔完成了他那神秘又模糊的矮人研究计划。他好像在等待别的东西，也许到时候我就能知道这一切到底怎么回事了。

translations.english: I've successfully altered Arniel's warped soul gem, and should return it to him. It is somehow critical to his project regarding the disappearance of the dwarves; perhaps he'll explain exactly what he's up to.
translations.chinese: 我成功改变了阿内尔给我的扭曲灵魂石，现在应该还给他了。这可能对他针对矮人消失的计划至关重要，也许他会向我解释自己的想法。

translations.english: Deliver the soul gem to Arniel
Place the warped soul gem into a Convector
translations.chinese: 将扭曲的灵魂石放入环流器

translations.english: Place the warpred soul gem into a final Convector
translations.chinese: 将扭曲的灵魂石最后的环流器

translations.english: Place the warped soul gem into another Convector
translations.chinese: 将扭曲的灵魂石放入其他环流器

translations.english: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. I met with her contact, Malborn, who is going to smuggle some of my equipment into the Thalmor ambassador's manor. I'm going to infiltrate the manor posing as a guest at the ambassador's party. Once inside, I need to meet up with Malborn and figure out a way to slip away from the party without being caught.
translations.chinese: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。我和她的线人马伯恩碰过头了。他会帮我把装备偷运进梭默大使馆。我需要扮成宴会宾客潜入大使馆的庄园里。进去后我就得找到马伯恩，想办法在不被发现的情况下溜出宴会。

translations.english: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. She's going to help me infiltrate the Thalmor ambassador's manor and find out what they know about the dragons. I should meet with her contact, Malborn, in the Winking Skeever Inn in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。她会协助我潜入梭默大使馆，查看他们对龙族的了解。我要去独孤城的眨眼恶鼠旅店和她的线人马伯恩碰头。

translations.english: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. She's going to talk to her contacts about how we can infiltrate the Thalmor Embassy.
translations.chinese: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。她要和线人商量如何混进梭默大使馆。

translations.english: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. Her contact, Malborn, smuggled some of my equipment into the Thalmor ambassador's manor. I infiltrated the manor posing as a guest at the ambassador's party. Now I need to search the ambassador's office to find out what the Thalmor know about the dragons.
translations.chinese: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。她的线人马伯恩帮我偷运了一些装备进入大使馆。我也冒充大使宴会的宾客混进了庄园。现在我得搜查大使馆办公室，看看梭默对龙有什么了解。

translations.english: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. With the help of her contact, Malborn, I infiltrated the manor posing as a guest at the ambassador's party. I've now learned that the Thalmor are just as in the dark as we are - in fact, they're searching Riften for a Blade named Esbern, who they believe knows what the return of the dragons means.
translations.chinese: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。在线人马伯恩的协助下，我以宴会宾客的身份混进使馆庄园。我现在查清，梭默跟我们一样蒙在鼓里。事实上他们正在裂谷城搜寻一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，他们认为这个人知晓龙族回归的意义。

translations.english: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. With the help of her contact, Malborn, I infiltrated the manor posing as a guest at the ambassador's party. I learned that the Thalmor are just as in the dark as we are - in fact, they're searching Riften for a Blade named Esbern, who they believe knows what the return of the dragons means.
translations.chinese: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。在线人马伯恩的协助下，我以宴会宾客的身份混进使馆庄园。我现在查清，梭默跟我们一样蒙在鼓里。事实上他们正在裂谷城搜寻一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，他们认为这个人知晓龙族回归的意义。

translations.english: Search for information about the dragons returning
translations.chinese: 搜索关于龙族回归的信息

translations.english: Create a distraction and get away from the party

translations.chinese: 在独孤城与马伯恩见面
在河木镇与戴尔芬见面

Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. Her contact, Malborn, smuggled some of my equipment into the Thalmor ambassador's manor. I infiltrated the manor posing as a guest at the ambassador's party. Now I need to search the ambassador's office to find out what the Thalmor know about the dragons. | ZH: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。她的线人马伯恩帮我偷运了一些装备进入大使馆。我也冒充大使宴会的宾客混进了庄园。现在我得搜查大使馆办公室，看看梭默对龙有什么了解。 | SID: 01060C
- QUST:CNAM [4/5] | EN: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. With the help of her contact, Malborn, I infiltrated the manor posing as a guest at the ambassador's party. I've now learned that the Thalmor are just as in the dark as we are - in fact, they're searching Riften for a Blade named Esbern, who they believe knows what the return of the dragons means. | ZH: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。在线人马伯恩的协助下，我以宴会宾客的身份混进使馆庄园。我现在查清，梭默跟我们一样蒙在鼓里。事实上他们正在裂谷城搜寻一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，他们认为这个人知晓龙族回归的意义。 | SID: 0107A1

Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. I learned that the Thalmor are just as in the dark as we are - in fact, they're searching Riften for a Blade named Esbern, who they believe knows what the return of the dragons means. | ZH: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。在线人马伯恩的协助下，我以宴会宾客的身份混进使馆庄园。我现在查清，梭默跟我们一样蒙在鼓里。事实上他们正在裂谷城搜寻一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，他们认为这个人知晓龙族回归的意义。 | SID: 010BBD

translations.english: The Thalmor are just as puzzled as we are about why dragons are returning. I learned that they are looking for a Blade named Esbern, who Delphine says is an expert on ancient dragon lore. We need to find him before the Thalmor do.
translations.chinese: 梭默和我们一样为龙族回归的事困惑不已。我查明他们想要找到一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，戴尔芬说他是研究古代龙族知识的专家。我们得在梭默之前找到他。

translations.english: The Thalmor are just as puzzled as we are about why dragons are returning. I learned that they are looking for a Blade named Esbern, who is supposed to be an expert on ancient dragon lore. I found Esbern hiding in the Ratway in Riften, and convinced him to let me in to explain myself.
translations.chinese: 梭默和我们一样为龙族回归的事困惑不已。我查明他们想要找到一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，据说他是研究古代龙族知识的专家。我打听到伊思本躲在裂谷城的鼠道里，并尝试说服他让我进门解释。

translations.english: The Thalmor are just as puzzled as we are about why dragons are returning. I learned that they are looking for a Blade named Esbern, who is supposed to be an expert on ancient dragon lore. I've learned that he's hiding out in the Ratway Warrens in Riften.
translations.chinese: 梭默和我们一样为龙族回归的事困惑不已。我查明他们想要找到一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，据说他是研究古代龙族知识的专家。我打听到他藏在裂谷城的鼠道窝棚里。

translations.english: The Thalmor are just as puzzled as we are about why dragons are returning. I learned that they are looking for a Blade named Esbern, who is supposed to be an expert on ancient dragon lore. I found Esbern hiding in the Ratway in Riften, and convinced him to let me in to explain myself.
translations.chinese: 梭默和我们一样为龙族回归的事困惑不已。我查明他们想要找到一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，据说他是研究古代龙族知识的专家。我打听到伊思本躲在裂谷城的鼠道里，并尝试说服他让我进门解释。

translations.english: Find Esbern in the Ratway Warrens
translations.chinese: 在鼠道窝棚找到伊思本

translations.english: Search the Ratway for Esbern's hideout
translations.chinese: 在鼠道里寻找伊思本的藏身处

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. With the help of the Jarl of Whiterun, I've trapped the dragon Odahviing in Dragonsreach. Now to interrogate Odahviing and learn the location of Alduin's lair so I can finish him off, once and for all.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。在白漫城领主的帮助下，我在龙临宫活捉了巨龙傲达威英。现在我要审问傲达威英，找出奥杜因的藏身之处，这样我就能一劳永逸地解决他了。

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. The Jarl of Whiterun has agreed to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach. I've learned a Shout which is the name of one of Alduin's allies, which should serve to bring him to the Dragonsreach courtyard so I can trap him there. Then I can interrogate the dragon and learn the location of Alduin's lair so I can finish him off, once and for all.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。白漫领主同意帮助我在龙临宫捕获巨龙。我已经学会了召唤奥杜因一位盟友名字的龙吼。应该能把他引到龙临宫的大门廊困起来。然后我就能审问奥杜因巢穴的具体位置并彻底消灭他了。

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. The Jarl of Whiterun has agreed to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach. Then I can interrogate the dragon and learn the location of Alduin's lair so I can finish him off, once and for all.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。白漫领主同意帮助我在龙临宫捕获巨龙。这样我就能审问奥杜因巢穴的具体位置并彻底消灭他了。

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. The Jarl of Whiterun has agreed to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach. Now I need some way to lure a dragon into the trap. Esbern or Paarthurnax might be able to help.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。白漫领主同意帮助我在龙临宫捕获巨龙。现在我需要想办法把龙引到陷阱中。伊思本或者帕图纳克斯也许能帮上忙。

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. I've learned that Dragonsreach, the Jarl's palace in Whiterun, was once used to imprison a dragon. If I can arrange a truce in the civil war, the Jarl of Whiterun has agreed to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach. Then I can interrogate the dragon and learn the location of Alduin's lair so I can finish him off, once and for all.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。我得知白漫城领主的宫殿——龙临宫，曾经用来囚禁巨龙。如果我能安排内战休战，白漫领主同意帮我在龙临宫捕捉巨龙。然后我就可以审问奥杜因巢穴的具体位置并彻底消灭他了。

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. I've learned that Dragonsreach, the Jarl's palace in Whiterun, was once used to imprison a dragon. I need to persuade the Jarl of Whiterun to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。我得知白漫城领主的宫殿——龙临宫，曾经用来囚禁巨龙。我需要说服白漫领主帮助我在龙临宫捕获巨龙。

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. With the help of the Jarl of Whiterun, I've trapped the dragon Odahviing in Dragonsreach. Odahviing revealed that Alduin's lair is located in the ancient temple of Skuldafn, which is only accessible by air. Odahviing has offered to take me there, in return for his freedom.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。在白漫城领主的帮助下，我在龙临宫活捉了巨龙傲达威英。傲达威英透露，奥杜因的巢穴在远古神庙斯库达芬，只能靠飞行到达。傲达威英提出带我过去，以换取自由。

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. I need to locate his lair so I can finish him off, once and for all.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。我需要找到他的老巢，一劳永逸地解决他。

translations.english: Talk to the Jarl of Whiterun

translations.chinese: 将傲达威英召唤到龙临宫
学会召唤傲达威英的龙吼

translations.english: Get Greybeards' help in negotiating a truce
translations.chinese: 在休战谈判中取得灰胡子的帮助

translations.english: I've passed through Alduin's portal into Sovngarde, the realm of Aetherius where the souls of Nord heroes go to feast and battle until the final reckoning. Now to find Alduin and defeat him once and for all.
translations.chinese: 我已经通过奥杜因的传送门进入了松加德。这里是光界的领域，诺德英灵们在那里欢宴战斗直至最终决战到来。我要去找奥杜因，彻底打败他。

translations.english: I've passed through Alduin's portal into Sovngarde, the realm of Aetherius where the souls of Nord heroes go to feast and battle until the final reckoning. Alduin has laid some kind of soul-snare across the valley of Sovngarde, a mist where he hides and feeds upon the trapped souls. My only hope is to reach the Hall of Heroes.
translations.chinese: 我已经通过奥杜因的传送门进入了松加德。这里是光界的领域，诺德英灵们在那里欢宴战斗直至最终决战到来。奥杜因在松加德的山谷中布下了某种灵魂陷阱，他藏身在迷雾中并以被困的灵魂为食。英雄大厅是我唯一的希望。

translations.english: I've passed through Alduin's portal into Sovngarde, the realm of Aetherius where the souls of Nord heroes go to feast and battle until the final reckoning. Alduin has laid some kind of soul-snare across the valley of Sovngarde, a mist where he hides and feeds upon the trapped souls. I reached the Hall of Heroes and met Gormlaith Golden-Hilt, Hakon One-Eye, and Felldir the Old - the three heroes who I saw defeat Alduin in my vision of the past. They have been permitted by Shor, the god of the underworld, to join me in my battle against Alduin.
translations.chinese: 我已经通过奥杜因的传送门进入了松加德。这里是光界的领域，诺德英灵们在那里欢宴战斗直至最终决战到来。奥杜因在松加德的山谷中布下了某种灵魂陷阱，他藏身在迷雾中并以被困的灵魂为食。我在英雄大厅遇到了“金剑柄”葛姆拉丝、“独眼”哈肯、“老者”费迪尔，我曾在幻象中看到这三位英雄击败了奥杜因。他们得到幽域之神舒尔的许可，加入了我对抗奥杜因的战斗。

translations.english: Find out how to defeat Alduin
translations.chinese: 找到击败奥杜因的方法

translations.english: Talk to the heroes of Sovngarde
translations.chinese: 与松加德的英雄们交谈

translations.english: Gain admittance to the Hall of Valor
translations.chinese: 获得进入勇士大厅的许可

translations.english: I'm imprisoned inside Cidhna Mine, framed for Eltrys' murder. I have to find Madanach, the King in Rags, and clear my name.
translations.chinese: 我被关进了希讷矿场，罪名是谋杀了艾斯翠。我必须找到褴褛王迈德纳奇，为自己洗清罪名。

translations.english: I have helped Madanach escape Cidhna Mine, and he and his Forsworn have taken credit for all my past crime, clearing my name in the Reach.
translations.chinese: 我帮助迈德纳奇逃离了希讷矿场，他和弃誓者担负了我过去所有罪行，帮我洗脱了在瑞驰的罪名。

translations.english: Thonar Silver-Blood has granted me a pardon for killing Madanach. My name has now been cleared in the Reach.
translations.chinese: 托纳尔·银血赦免了我杀死迈德纳奇的罪行。我已经洗脱了在瑞驰的罪名。
向囚犯询问关于迈德纳奇的事

translations.english: Potema has been summoned from beyond the grave and is gathering power. Styrr has given me the key to Potema's Catacombs. I must enter the catacombs and prevent Potema from fully resurrecting by acquiring her bones.
translations.chinese: 波特玛被从坟墓里召唤出来，正在积蓄力量。斯提尔将波特玛地下墓穴的钥匙交给了我。我必须进入墓穴取回她的骸骨，阻止她完全复活。

translations.english: Potema has been summoned from beyond the grave and is gathering power. Falk has sent me to Styrr to get the key to Potema's Catacombs.
translations.chinese: 波特玛被从坟墓里召唤出来，正在积蓄力量。佛可派我到斯提尔那里去拿波特玛地下墓穴的钥匙。

translations.english: I have defeated Potema and been rewarded by Falk Firebeard.
translations.chinese: 我击败了波特玛，得到了“火胡”佛可的奖励。

translations.english: Potema has been summoned from beyond the grave. I've defeated her in the Catacombs and retrieved her bones. I must return them to Styrr for blessing and tell Falk Potema has been defeated.
translations.chinese: 波特玛被从坟墓里召唤出来了。我在地下墓穴击败了她，找到了她的骸骨。我要把它交给斯提尔净化，然后告诉佛可波特玛被打败了。
把波特玛的遗骸交给斯提尔

translations.english: The leader of the so-called "assassins" I've been asked to eliminate claims that Saadia betrayed her people to the Dominion and they are here to bring her to justice. I've agreed to lead her into an ambush at the Whiterun stables.
translations.chinese: 所谓“刺客”的首领告诉我萨蒂亚向先祖神洲出卖自己的人民，他们来此是为了将她绳之以法。我同意把她带到白漫马厩的埋伏处。

translations.english: The barmaid at the Bannered Mare in Whiterun is apparently a fugitive noble from Hammerfell. She claims that she is on the run from assassins sent by rival houses in her homeland and needs someone to stop them before they find her.
translations.chinese: 白漫城悬旗母马的酒保显然是落锤来的流亡贵族。她声称正在躲避来自她家乡的敌对家族派出的刺客，需要找人在他们把她抓走前阻止他们。

translations.english: A group of men calling themselves the Alik'r are looking for a Redguard woman in Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 一群自称阿里克'尔的人正在寻找一个住在白漫城的红卫人。

translations.english: I've helped Saadia escape the clutches of the Alik'r sent after her. With their leader defeated, she believes the rest of them will scatter, affording her some much-needed safety for now.
translations.chinese: 我帮萨蒂亚摆脱了追杀她的阿里克'尔。她相信，首领被杀之后，其余人会散去，她也就获得了急需的安全。

translations.english: After making arrangements with Kematu, I've delivered Saadia to him. He assures me that she will be taken back to Hammerfell alive, though after that her fate is no longer in his hands.
translations.chinese: 与凯马图商量好后，我将萨蒂亚交给了他。他向我保证，会将萨蒂亚活着押解回落锤，但在那之后，她的命运就不掌握在他的手中了。

translations.english: Lead Saadia to the Whiterun Stables
translations.chinese: 把萨蒂亚带到白漫城马厩

translations.english: Kill Kematu OR Convince Saadia to meet Kematu
translations.chinese: 杀死凯马图 或 说服萨蒂亚去见凯马图

translations.english: Find a way to enter the Alik'r hideout
translations.chinese: 想办法进入阿里克'尔的藏身处

translations.english: Inform the Alik'r of Saadia's location
translations.chinese: 把萨蒂亚的位置报告给阿里克'尔

translations.english: Kill Kematu or talk to him
translations.chinese: 杀死凯马图或和他谈谈

translations.english: Inform the Alik'r of Saadia's location
translations.chinese: 把萨蒂亚的位置报告给阿里克'尔

translations.english:
[pagebreak]

The Nirnroot Missive Revised Edition By Sinderion

[pagebreak]

[pagebreak] The following is a transcript of the speech given by Master Alchemist Sinderion at the Alchemical Symposium on Rain's Hand of 4E 02. It is a revised version of an earlier missive Sinderion gave to the same group several years before. We've done the best we could to preserve the original tone of his speech, but some light embellishments have been made for editorial reasons and for clarity. Sharmirin Raythorne, Imperial Scribe [pagebreak] would like to address the Symposium today with some startling revelations regarding the nirnroot. Although this curiously tenacious flora grows almost anywhere a significant body of water is present, it's extremely rare, and soon to become extinct. After years of extensive research, and the tireless efforts of my field assistant, I came into the possession of a large sampling of nirnroot. According to the theories presented by the noted Imperial Herbalist Chivius Regelliam, the nirnroot once flourished until a cataclysmic event severely reduced their numbers. Although many scholars reject the proposal that the Sun's Death event of 1E 668 catastrophically affected plant life, Chivius felt that the nirnroot's normal growth cycle was interrupted by the lack of sun for a full year. Whereas other plant species tend to "find a way," the nirnroot's mysterious magical nature made it especially susceptible to this climate shift. While this may or may not be the case, it's certainly true that the recorded sightings of nirnroot are declining as the years pass. Chivius's notes oddly describe the nirnroot as emitting a "brilliant yellowish glow." Contrary to this fact, the nirnroot of today has a soft, haunting blue-white glow. Subsequent studies by other scholars have failed to adequately explain this shift in hue. I propose that the nirnroot sensed its own impending extinction and therefore altered its metabolism in order to survive. One of the most glaring pieces of evidence of my theory is the presence of nirnroot in subterranean environments... places completely devoid of sunlight. Strangely, Chivius's notes fail to mention even a single instance of a subterrestrial nirnroot. How could this be? How could a surface-dwelling plant suddenly begin appearing in new locations radically different from its normal habitat? The answer, my fellow alchemists, is ironically concealed within Chivius's own notes. Although he spends a great deal of time experimenting with the nirnroot in his laboratory, he overlooked an important part of a plant's growth cycle... its soil. Chivius was correct in assuming the volcanic eruption of Red Mountain contributed to the demise of the nirnroot, but I believe the ash from that mighty explosion did more than simply cloud the skies. When mixed with the fertile soil of Cyrodiil, this fine powder is the true cause of the nirnroot's astounding metamorphosis. Although little volcanic ash from that dark time remains, I have performed tests on samples sent to me from Vvardenfell. Careful scrutiny of the samples revealed that they were rife with "ash salt," a highly magical substance. Dunmer native to the Vvardenfell region were known to have used ash salt as an ingredient to cure the "Blight," an awful disease which decimated their realm hundreds of years ago. This unique property of the ash salt coupled with the nirnroot's inherent magic caused the radical change... in essence; the root "healed itself." In summation, it's clear that the nirnroot was dying and used a byproduct of its destructor to preserve itself. I feel the nirnroot has accomplished in a relatively short amount of time what it would take other species thousands of years to complete. Whether you subscribe to my theory or not, one thing is certain; the nirnroot is on a path to destruction. It contains untapped potential to create potions the likes of which have never been seen in our day. I propose to you today that we divert a small portion of our funds to an expedition to collect some of these roots to study. I have outlined this proposal for your perusal after this section of the Symposium. Please, seriously consider this proposal before it becomes too late, and the nirnroot becomes nothing but a memory. Thank you for your time.
translations.chinese:
[pagebreak]

奈恩根书信 修订版 辛德莱昂 著

[pagebreak]

[pagebreak] 下文是炼金大师辛德莱昂于4E02年雨手月的炼金术研讨大会上所做的演讲。是辛德莱昂数年前给同一团体的信件的再修订。我们已尽最大努力来保持其演讲的原本基调，但出于编辑和清晰文理的考虑而略加修饰。 帝国抄写员 沙米林·雷霍恩 [pagebreak] 我希望在今天的研讨会上发表关于奈恩根的惊人发现。 尽管这种奇特而顽强的植物几乎可能生长在任何重要水体附近，但却非常罕见，几近灭绝。经过多年广泛研究，以及我的田野助手不懈努力，我获得了大量奈恩根样本。根据著名帝国草药学者奇维乌斯·雷格里姆的假说，奈恩根曾一度繁荣，直到一场灾难性事件导致了数量严重减少。尽管许多学者反对1E668年的“日之死”事件灾难性地影响了植物生命的说法，但奇维乌斯认为，一整年没有阳光导致了奈恩根的正常生长周期被打断了。尽管其他植物倾向于“另寻他路”，但奈恩根的神秘魔法性质使其特别容易受到气候变化的影响。情况究竟如何不得而知，但随着时间推移，有记录的奈恩根目击事件正在减少却是毋庸置疑的。 奇维乌斯的笔记里奇怪地描述奈恩根散发的是“明亮的黄色光芒”。与此相反，今天的奈恩根散发的是一种柔和迷人的蓝白色光芒。其他学者后续的研究也未能充分解释这种色调变化的原因。我个人认为是奈恩根感受到了自己即将灭绝，因此改变了自己的代谢方式来求得生存。我这一猜想的最明显证据之一就是地下环境中存在的奈恩根，能够在完全没有阳光的地方生存。奇怪的是，奇维乌斯的笔记里从没提到过奈恩根在地下生长的案例。这又是怎么回事？一种地表植物怎么会突然出现在与其正常栖息环境截然不同的新地方呢？ 炼金同仁们，讽刺的是，答案就隐藏在奇维乌斯自己的笔记中。尽管他花了大量的时间在实验室里对奈恩根进行实验，但他忽略了植物生长周期里的一个重要部分--土壤。奇维乌斯认为红山的火山爆发导致了奈恩根的灭绝，这是正确的，但我相信那次巨大爆炸产生的火山灰不仅仅是使天空蒙上了云。当与希罗帝尔的肥沃土壤混合时，这种细粉末就成了奈恩根巨大变化的真正原因。尽管那段黑暗时期的火山灰所剩无几，但我已经对瓦登费尔寄给我的样本进行了测试。仔细检查这些样品，发现它们充满了“灰烬盐”，这是一种非常神奇的物质。丹莫出生在瓦登费尔地区，他们使用灰烬盐作为治疗“枯萎病”的原料，这种可怕的疾病在几百年前摧毁了他们的王国。灰烬盐的独特属性加上奈恩根的内在魔力导致了彻底的变化……从本质上说，就是奈恩根“自愈”了。 总之，很明显，奈恩根在灭绝过程中使用了毁灭自己之物的一个副产品来保存自己。我觉得奈恩根在相对较短的时间内完成了其他物种需要数千年才能完成的事情。 不管你是否赞同我的理论，有一件事是肯定的;奈恩根正在走向毁灭。它蕴含着未开发的潜力，可以创造出我们今天从未见过的药水。我今天向你们提议，从我们的基金中拨出一小部分来进行一次探险，收集这些根进行研究。在研讨会的这一部分之后，我会总结此提议供你们阅读。请认真考虑，否则就太迟了，到时候奈恩根将成为回忆。 感谢聆听。

奈恩根书信 修订版 辛德莱昂 著

[pagebreak]

[pagebreak] 下文是炼金大师辛德莱昂于4E02年雨手月的炼金术研讨大会上所做的演讲。是辛德莱昂数年前给同一团体的信件的再修订。我们已尽最大努力来保持其演讲的原本基调，但出于编辑和清晰文理的考虑而略加修饰。 帝国抄写员 沙米林·雷霍恩 [pagebreak] 我希望在今天的研讨会上发表关于奈恩根的惊人发现。 尽管这种奇特而顽强的植物几乎可能生长在任何重要水体附近，但却非常罕见，几近灭绝。经过多年广泛研究，以及我的田野助手不懈努力，我获得了大量奈恩根样本。根据著名帝国草药学者奇维乌斯·雷格里姆的假说，奈恩根曾一度繁荣，直到一场灾难性事件导致了数量严重减少。尽管许多学者反对1E668年的“日之死”事件灾难性地影响了植物生命的说法，但奇维乌斯认为，一整年没有阳光导致了奈恩根的正常生长周期被打断了。尽管其他植物倾向于“另寻他路”，但奈恩根的神秘魔法性质使其特别容易受到气候变化的影响。情况究竟如何不得而知，但随着时间推移，有记录的奈恩根目击事件正在减少却是毋庸置疑的。 奇维乌斯的笔记里奇怪地描述奈恩根散发的是“明亮的黄色光芒”。与此相反，今天的奈恩根散发的是一种柔和迷人的蓝白色光芒。其他学者后续的研究也未能充分解释这种色调变化的原因。我个人认为是奈恩根感受到了自己即将灭绝，因此改变了自己的代谢方式来求得生存。我这一猜想的最明显证据之一就是地下环境中存在的奈恩根，能够在完全没有阳光的地方生存。奇怪的是，奇维乌斯的笔记里从没提到过奈恩根在地下生长的案例。这又是怎么回事？一种地表植物怎么会突然出现在与其正常栖息环境截然不同的新地方呢？ 炼金同仁们，讽刺的是，答案就隐藏在奇维乌斯自己的笔记中。尽管他花了大量的时间在实验室里对奈恩根进行实验，但他忽略了植物生长周期里的一个重要部分--土壤。奇维乌斯认为红山的火山爆发导致了奈恩根的灭绝，这是正确的，但我相信那次巨大爆炸产生的火山灰不仅仅是使天空蒙上了云。当与希罗帝尔的肥沃土壤混合时，这种细粉末就成了奈恩根巨大变化的真正原因。尽管那段黑暗时期的火山灰所剩无几，但我已经对瓦登费尔寄给我的样本进行了测试。仔细检查这些样品，发现它们充满了“灰烬盐”，这是一种非常神奇的物质。丹莫出生在瓦登费尔地区，他们使用灰烬盐作为治疗“枯萎病”的原料，这种可怕的疾病在几百年前摧毁了他们的王国。灰烬盐的独特属性加上奈恩根的内在魔力导致了彻底的变化……从本质上说，就是奈恩根“自愈”了。 总之，很明显，奈恩根在灭绝过程中使用了毁灭自己之物的一个副产品来保存自己。我觉得奈恩根在相对较短的时间内完成了其他物种需要数千年才能完成的事情。 不管你是否赞同我的理论，有一件事是肯定的;奈恩根正在走向毁灭。它蕴含着未开发的潜力，可以创造出我们今天从未见过的药水。我今天向你们提议，从我们的基金中拨出一小部分来进行一次探险，收集这些根进行研究。在研讨会的这一部分之后，我会总结此提议供你们阅读。请认真考虑，否则就太迟了，到时候奈恩根将成为回忆。 感谢聆听。 | SID: 011A57 - BOOK:FULL | EN: The Nirnroot Missive | ZH: 奈恩根书信 | SID: 011A32

translations.english: I've dealt with the three troublesome business owners in Riften as Brynjolf had specified. Perhaps now that I've proven my worth to Brynjolf, I can discover more about this mysterious organization that he represents.
translations.chinese: 我已经按布林乔夫所说和裂谷城的三个店主谈过了。也许我现在已经向布林乔夫证明了自己的价值，我可以进一步了解他所代表的神秘组织。

translations.english: After successfully locating the Ragged Flagon, Brynjolf has given me a new assignment. Three business owners in Riften are proving to be a thorn in his side and I'm supposed to teach them the error of their ways. I should speak to Brynjolf about these townspeople in the event that they prove to be as stubborn as I'm expecting them to be.
translations.chinese: 成功找到漏壶之后，布林乔夫给了我一项新任务。裂谷城的三个店主是他的眼中钉，而我要去教训他们。我应该跟布林乔夫先谈谈这些人，以防他们真的如我所想那般固执。

translations.english: Brynjolf has promised me more work if I'm able to locate him at a tavern called the Ragged Flagon. Judging from the dangerous nature of its location, it seems as though he's having me perform some type of initiation, but I can't be certain.
translations.chinese: 布林乔夫许诺，如果我能到漏壶找到他，他会给我安排更多工作。从这地方的危险程度来看，他好像在给我进行什么入会仪式，但我也不确定。
（可选）砸碎“甜手”波西的珍贵矮人瓮

translations.english: Locate Brynjolf at the Ragged Flagon

translations.chinese: （可选）偷走哈尔嘉的迪贝拉雕像

translations.english: (Optional) Use Talen-Jei to get to Keerava

translations.english: Now that Mallus's position as the owner of Honningbrew Meadery has been secured, I need to find any information explaining how Sabjorn was able to fund this costly operation.
translations.chinese: 莫鲁斯作为蜜之酿酒庄老板的地位已经确定了，我需要找到任何可以解释撒布乔恩获取资金来源的线索。

translations.english: The plan worked perfectly and Whiterun's Captain of the Guard was stricken with illness when he drank the poisoned mead. Sabjorn's been carted off to jail and Honningbrew Meadery is now closed.
translations.chinese: 计划十分成功，白漫城的卫兵队长喝下有毒的蜜酒后感到不适。撒布乔恩被送进了监狱，蜜之酿酒庄关门大吉了。

translations.english: Sabjorn has provided me with poison I'm to apply to the nests deep within the tunnels under Honningbrew Meadery. As Mallus predicted, I should be able to use the very same poison to taint Sabjorn's mead as well.
translations.chinese: 撒布乔恩把毒药交给我，让我用在蜜之酿酒庄地下隧道深处的巢穴里。如莫鲁斯所料，我也可以把同样的毒药放进撒布乔恩的蜜酒里。

translations.english: I've become a key component in a cunning plan to frame Honningbrew Meadery's owner, Sabjorn, and have him imprisoned. The first part of the scheme is to approach Sabjorn under the guise of assistance with a pest problem he's having thanks to Mallus's tinkering.
translations.chinese: 我已经加入了陷害蜜之酿酒庄老板撒布乔恩并把他关进监狱的狡猾计划。该计划的第一部分是打着帮助莫鲁斯解决害虫问题的幌子，接近撒布乔恩。

translations.english: I've been sent to speak to Maven Black-Briar, head of the wealthiest most influential family in Riften. According to Brynjolf, she has a job of utmost importance for me and I need to follow her directions to the letter.
translations.chinese: 我奉命去见玛雯·黑棘，她是裂谷城最富有且最有影响力的家族的首领。据布林乔夫说，她有一份对我至关重要的工作，必须严格按她的指示去做。

translations.english: Maven Black-Briar has sent me to Whiterun where I am to meet with someone named Mallus Maccius. Together, our goal is to bring down one of Maven's competitors, Honningbrew Meadery and discover where he obtained the financing to take her on.
translations.chinese: 玛雯·黑棘派我去白漫城见一个叫莫鲁斯·马修斯的人。我们的目标是扳倒玛雯的竞争对手蜜之酿酒庄，并且找到他们的资金来源。

translations.english: The information I obtained from Honningbrew Meadery points to the same anonymous buyer of Goldenglow Estate. If successful, this individual would have completely estranged Maven Black-Briar from the Guild and destroyed it economically. It's becoming painfully obvious that it's time to shed some light on our mysterious adversary before they have a chance to strike again.
translations.chinese: 我从蜜之酿酒庄获得的线索，指向了买下金色光辉庄园的同一个匿名买家。如果计划成功，此人将彻底让玛雯·黑棘与公会分裂，并在经济上摧毁公会。在我们的神秘对手再次发动袭击前，我们需要对他有所了解。
找出撒布乔恩的神秘合伙人

translations.english: I'm on my way to meet Mercer Frey at the ruins of Snow Veil Sanctum, Karliah's last known location. Together, Mercer and I intend to hunt her down and make her pay for Gallus's murder.
translations.chinese: 我要去雪幔圣所遗迹和墨瑟·弗雷会面，那是卡莱亚最后出没的地方。墨瑟和我打算一起找到她，让她为杀害加卢斯付出代价。

translations.english: The tables have unexpectedly turned, and Mercer Frey has been revealed as Gallus's killer. I now find myself in Karliah's care after Mercer tried to murder me, claiming I'd outlasted my usefulness by witnessing their conversation. I've also discovered that Mercer, Gallus and Karliah were members of some sort of group calling themselves "The Nightingales" - guardians in service to the goddess Nocturnal. What they're protecting or what this has to do with the Guild is still a mystery to me.
translations.chinese: 形势突然逆转，墨瑟·弗雷才是杀害加卢斯的凶手。我发现自己正被卡莱亚照顾，因为墨瑟试图杀我，说我因为目睹了他们的对话而失去价值。我还发现墨瑟、加卢斯、卡莱亚都是某个自称“夜莺”的组织中的成员，夜莺是女神诺克图娜尔的守护者。他们在保护什么，或者说这与公会有什么关系，对我来说仍然是谜。

translations.english: Meet Mercer Frey outside Snow Veil Sanctum
translations.chinese: 在雪幔圣所外和墨瑟·弗雷见面

translations.english: Calcelmo has proven to be extremely stubborn and refuses to allow me access to his materials regarding the Falmer language. I'm left with little choice other than taking matters into my own hands and stealing his notes.
translations.chinese: 卡塞莫十分顽固，不愿意让我接触他关于伐莫语的材料。我别无选择，只能自己动手偷取他的笔记。

translations.english: Calcelmo's "notes" on the Falmer language are actually derived from a massive stone slab in his tower! It will be impossible to bring this item to Enthir to have him translate Gallus's Journal. I'll have to discover a way to make the information more portable.
translations.chinese: 卡塞莫的“研究笔记”实际上来自他塔楼里的一块巨大石板！我不可能把这东西背回去让恩希尔翻译加卢斯的日记。我得想办法把这些信息带出去。

translations.english: Karliah believes the only proof that could expose Mercer's treachery can be found within the pages of Gallus's journal which she recovered from Snow Veil Sanctum. Unfortunately, the journal is written in some sort of code that needs to be deciphered. Our only hope is Enthir, one of Karliah and Gallus's former acquaintances who is a wizard at the College of Winterhold.
translations.chinese: 卡莱亚认为揭露墨瑟背叛的唯一证据就是她在雪幔圣所找到的加卢斯日记。可惜，日记是用某种需要破译的暗码书写的。我们只能寄希望于卡莱亚和加卢斯以前的熟人，冬堡学院的巫师恩希尔。

translations.english: Enthir has informed me that Gallus's Journal is written in Falmer. He's directed me to seek out Calcelmo, the Court Wizard in Markarth who is the foremost authority on them in hopes of obtaining a translation.
translations.chinese: 恩希尔告诉我，加卢斯的日记用的是伐莫文字。他让我去找这方面的权威人士，马卡斯的宫廷巫师卡塞莫。希望能够得到译文。

translations.english: After Enthir successfully translated Gallus's journal, I've discovered that Mercer's motivations transcended simple greed or murder. As a member of the Nightingales, Mercer was tasked with guarding a place called The Twilight Sepulcher, the Temple of Nocturnal. According to Gallus, he defiled the temple and betrayed the Thieves Guild. Karliah insists we bring this information to Brynjolf immediately.
translations.chinese: 恩希尔成功翻译了加卢斯的日记，我发现墨瑟的动机不仅仅是贪婪或者谋杀。作为夜莺，他的任务是守卫一个叫做“黄昏坟墓”的地方，也是诺克图娜尔的圣殿。根据加卢斯的说法，墨瑟玷污了圣殿，背叛了盗贼公会。卡莱亚坚持要一起立刻把消息带给布林乔夫。

translations.english: Duplicate the writing on Calcelmo's Stone
translations.chinese: 复制卡塞莫石刻上的文字
获得卡塞莫的伐莫文翻译指南

translations.english: (Optional) Obtain the key to Calcelmo's Museum
translations.chinese: （可选）获得卡塞莫博物馆的钥匙

Our only hope is Enthir, one of Karliah and Gallus's former acquaintances who is a wizard at the College of Winterhold. | ZH: 卡莱亚认为揭露墨瑟背叛的唯一证据就是她在雪幔圣所找到的加卢斯日记。可惜，日记是用某种需要破译的暗码书写的。我们只能寄希望于卡莱亚和加卢斯以前的熟人，冬堡学院的巫师恩希尔。 | SID: 004E37
- QUST:CNAM [1/4] | EN: Enthir has informed me that Gallus's Journal is written in Falmer. He's directed me to seek out Calcelmo, the Court Wizard in Markarth who is the foremost authority on them in hopes of obtaining a translation. | ZH: 恩希尔告诉我，加卢斯的日记用的是伐莫文字。他让我去找这方面的权威人士，马卡斯的宫廷巫师卡塞莫。希望能够得到译文。 | SID: 00978A
- QUST:CNAM [4/4] | EN: After Enthir successfully translated Gallus's journal, I've discovered that Mercer's motivations transcended simple greed or murder. As a member of the Nightingales, Mercer was tasked with guarding a place called The Twilight Sepulcher, the Temple of Nocturnal. According to Gallus, he defiled the temple and betrayed the Thieves Guild. Karliah insists we bring this information to Brynjolf immediately. | ZH: 恩希尔成功翻译了加卢斯的日记，我发现墨瑟的动机不仅仅是贪婪或者谋杀。作为夜莺，他的任务是守卫一个叫做“黄昏坟墓”的地方，也是诺克图娜尔的圣殿。根据加卢斯的说法，墨瑟玷污了圣殿，背叛了盗贼公会。卡莱亚坚持要一起立刻把消息带给布林乔夫。 | SID: 010724
- QUST:FULL | EN: Hard Answers | ZH: 艰难的回答 | SID: 002F76
- QUST:NNAM [8/8] | EN: Speak to Karliah | ZH: 与卡莱亚交谈 | SID: 002276
- QUST:NNAM [7/8] | EN: Speak to Enthir | ZH: 与恩希尔交谈 | SID: 002279
- QUST:NNAM [6/8] | EN: Return to Enthir | ZH: 回去找恩希尔 | SID: 00227F
- QUST:NNAM [5/8] | EN: Duplicate the writing on Calcelmo's Stone | ZH: 复制卡塞莫石刻上的文字 | SID: 002280
- QUST:NNAM [4/8] | EN: Obtain Calcelmo's Falmer Translating Guide | ZH: 获得卡塞莫的伐莫文翻译指南 | SID: 002283
- QUST:NNAM [2/8] | EN: Gain entry to Calcelmo's Museum | ZH: 进入卡塞莫的博物馆 | SID: 002286
- QUST:NNAM [0/8] | EN: Speak with Enthir | ZH: 与恩希尔交谈 | SID: 00228B
- QUST:NNAM [3/8] | EN: (Optional) Obtain the key to Calcelmo's Museum | ZH: （可选）获得卡塞莫博物馆的钥匙 | SID: 0065DE

translations.english: It was suggested that I show my Unusual Gem to Vex, a member of the Thieves Guild in Riften. However, I'll need to wait until I'm full member of the Guild before she'll be able to assist me.
translations.chinese: 有人建议我向裂谷城盗贼公会的小烦展示我手里不寻常的宝石。然而，我需要等到成为公会正式成员，她才能帮我。

translations.english: I've brought the Crown of Barenziah back to Vex, who has restored it to its original condition where it now serves as a paragon for the Thieves Guild.
translations.chinese: 我把巴兰兹亚王冠带给了小烦，她将它恢复成了原始状态，现在它成为了盗贼公会的典范。

translations.english: I've found an unusual gem which seems to exhibit magical properties. I should bring it to Vex at the Thieves Guild for an appraisal.
translations.chinese: 我发现了一颗不同寻常的宝石，似乎有着魔力。我应该把它拿给盗贼公会的小烦估价。

translations.english: The unusual gem has turned out to be one of twenty-four "Stones of Barenziah." According to Vex, they have little value unless the set is complete.
translations.chinese: 这颗不寻常的宝石是二十四颗“巴兰兹亚宝石”之一。根据小烦的说法，除非集齐，否则没有什么价值可言。

translations.english: Vex has revealed to me that the Crown of Barenziah is actually a paragon for the Thieves Guild. If I can recover the crown from Tolvald's Cave, she should be able to restore our paragon to its full strength.
translations.chinese: 小烦向我透露，巴兰兹亚的王冠其实是盗贼公会的典范。如果我能从托沃德洞穴找回王冠，她就能让我们的典范之宝恢复全部力量。

translations.english: Become a full member of the Thieves Guild
translations.chinese: 成为盗贼公会的正式成员

translations.english: Bring the Unusual Gem to Vex in the Thieves Guild
translations.chinese: 把不寻常的宝石带给盗贼公会的小烦看看

translations.english: I've recovered one of the Eyes of the Falmer from Irkngthand. I should take it to Delvin Mallory at the Ragged Flagon to determine its true value.
translations.chinese: 我取回了伐莫之眼的其中一个。我应该把它交给漏壶的戴尔文·马洛里鉴定一下。

translations.english: I've discovered what appears to be a shipping map for the East Empire Company. I should take it to Delvin Mallory at the Ragged Flagon to determine its true value.
translations.chinese: 我在东帝国公司发现了一幅航海图。我应该把它交给漏壶的戴尔文·马洛里鉴定一下。

translations.english: I've discovered the bust of a man named the Gray Fox inside Mercer Frey's House. I should take it to Delvin Mallory at the Ragged Flagon to determine its true value.
translations.chinese: 我在墨瑟·弗雷的房子里发现了一个灰狐雕像。我应该把它交给漏壶的戴尔文·马洛里鉴定一下。

translations.english: I've discovered the intricately crafted model of a sailing ship inside Snow Veil Sanctum. I should take it to Delvin Mallory at the Ragged Flagon to determine its true value.
translations.chinese: 我在雪幔圣所发现了一艘制作复杂的帆船模型。我应该把它交给漏壶的戴尔文·马洛里鉴定一下。

translations.english: I've discovered an unusual statue of a queen bee within Goldenglow Estate. I should take it to Delvin Mallory at the Ragged Flagon to determine its true value.
translations.chinese: 我在金色光辉庄园发现了一尊特别的蜂后雕像。我应该把它交给漏壶的戴尔文·马洛里鉴定一下。

translations.english: I've discovered an curious Dwemer-constructed puzzle cube inside Calcelmo's Quarters in Markarth. I should take it to Delvin Mallory at the Ragged Flagon to determine its true value.
translations.chinese: 我在马卡斯城卡塞莫的房间里发现了一个奇怪的锻莫制魔方。我应该把它交给漏壶的戴尔文·马洛里鉴定一下。

translations.english: I've discovered an unusual golden decanter inside Honningbrew Meadery. I should take it to Delvin Mallory at the Ragged Flagon to determine its true value.
translations.chinese: 我在蜜之酿酒庄发现了一个特别的金色玻璃瓶。我应该把它交给漏壶的戴尔文·马洛里鉴定一下。

translations.english: Return the Bust of the Gray Fox to Delvin
translations.chinese: 将灰狐半身像交给戴尔文

translations.english: Return the Ship Model to Delvin
Return the Eye of the Falmer to Delvin
translations.chinese: 将伐莫之眼交给戴尔文

translations.english: Return the Dwemer Puzzle Cube to Delvin
translations.chinese: 将锻莫魔方交给戴尔文

translations.english: Return the East Empire Shipping Map to Delvin

translations.english: The clanfolk of the Western Valenwood forests, also known as "Bosmer." Wood elves make good scouts and thieves, and there are no finer archers in all of Tamriel. They have natural resistances to both poisons and diseases. They can Command Animals to fight for them.
translations.chinese: 西方威伦森林的种族，也被称为“波斯莫”。木精灵是优秀的斥候和盗贼，全泰姆瑞尔难觅可以与之比肩的弓箭手。他们对毒素和疾病都具有天然的抵抗力。可以命令动物为其作战。

translations.english: When Aventus escaped, Grelod got meaner than ever. I really thought she was going to kill one of us. Guess not!
translations.chinese: 阿文图斯逃走后，桂罗变得更坏了。我真以为她会杀了我们谁的。猜不出来！

agentText:
Addon: Update
EDID: [00016CA1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: When Aventus escaped, Grelod got meaner than ever. I really thought she was going to kill one of us. Guess not! | ZH: 阿文图斯逃走后，桂罗变得更坏了。我真以为她会杀了我们谁的。猜不出来！ | SID: 00936C

translations.english: I do hope mummy and father come to get me soon. Ever since that Aventus boy left, this place has gone mad.
translations.chinese: 我真希望爸爸妈妈快点来接我。自从阿文图斯那小子离开以后，这地方就疯了。

agentText:
Addon: Update
EDID: [00016CA2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I do hope mummy and father come to get me soon. Ever since that Aventus boy left, this place has gone mad. | ZH: 我真希望爸爸妈妈快点来接我。自从阿文图斯那小子离开以后，这地方就疯了。 | SID: 001774

translations.english: When Aventus escaped, Grelod was so mad. I got double the beatings that day. But that won't happen ever again.
translations.chinese: 阿文图斯逃跑的时候，桂罗气疯了。我那天挨了两倍的打，但这再也不会发生了。

agentText:
Addon: Update
EDID: [00016CA3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: When Aventus escaped, Grelod was so mad. I got double the beatings that day. But that won't happen ever again. | ZH: 阿文图斯逃跑的时候，桂罗气疯了。我那天挨了两倍的打，但这再也不会发生了。 | SID: 006A49

translations.english: When Aventus took off, when he said those things, about killing Grelod... I never imagined he was serious...
translations.chinese: 阿文图斯离开时说的那些要杀死桂罗的话……我没想过他是认真的。

agentText:
Addon: Update
EDID: [00016CA4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: When Aventus took off, when he said those things, about killing Grelod... I never imagined he was serious... | ZH: 阿文图斯离开时说的那些要杀死桂罗的话……我没想过他是认真的。 | SID: 00D7E3

translations.english: Word out on the street is that he went home to Windhelm, and people have heard strange chanting coming from his house. Looks like he really did it!
translations.chinese: 街上有消息说，他回到了风舵城的家里，人们听到他家里传出奇怪的诵经声。他真的做到了！

translations.english: Aventus Aretino. He was sent to live here after his mother died. He escaped. And...
translations.chinese: 阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他母亲死了以后被送到这里。他逃走了。而且……

translations.english: Before he left, he said he was going to do the Black Sacrament. You know, to call the Dark Brotherhood. So they'd come and kill old Grelod!
translations.chinese: 他离开前，说他会执行黑色圣礼。就是召唤黑暗兄弟会。所以他们会来杀掉老桂罗！

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Aventus Aretino. He was sent to live here after his mother died. He escaped. And... | ZH: 阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他母亲死了以后被送到这里。他逃走了。而且…… | SID: 00A07A

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Who is Aventus? | ZH: 阿文图斯是谁？ | SID: 0053F4

translations.english: A little boy who lived here. Aventus Aretino. He was nice, but really quiet, and sad, because his mother just died.
translations.chinese: 一个住在这里的小男孩。阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他人很好，但太安静了，而且很伤心，因为他母亲刚去世。

translations.english: He ran away. Back home to Windhelm. Samuel told me he was trying to get some murderer people to come here and kill Grelod. Did he really do it?
translations.chinese: 他逃走了。回了风舵城的家里。萨穆埃尔告诉我他正在试着找杀手来杀桂罗。他真的成功了吗？

translations.english: Oh, Aventus Aretino. He was sent here when his mother died, but he ran away.
translations.chinese: 哦，阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他母亲死了以后被送到这里，但他逃走了。

translations.english: I heard he went back to his house in Windhelm, to try and get the Dark Brotherhood to come and murder Grelod. And... he actually pulled it off!
translations.chinese: 我听说他回了他在风舵城的家，想让黑暗兄弟会来杀桂罗。而且……他真的成功了！

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I heard he went back to his house in Windhelm, to try and get the Dark Brotherhood to come and murder Grelod. And... he actually pulled it off! | ZH: 我听说他回了他在风舵城的家，想让黑暗兄弟会来杀桂罗。而且……他真的成功了！ | SID: 00A33C
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Who is Aventus? | ZH: 阿文图斯是谁？ | SID: 00D7C2

translations.english: Aventus Aretino? He only lived here for awhile. I think his mother got sick and died or something. Anyway, he's gone now. He ran away.
translations.chinese: 阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺？他只在这里住过一阵。他妈妈好像是病死了。不管怎么样，他已经离开了。逃跑了。

translations.english: But Samuel told me he's back home in Windhelm, and did some kind of dark ritual. He summoned killers to murder old Grelod. He's saved us all.
translations.chinese: 萨穆埃尔告诉我他回了在风舵城的家，正在举行什么黑暗仪式。他让杀手来杀掉老桂罗。他救了我们大家。

translations.english: Balimund pulled me out of Grelod's orphanage when I was just a child. I don't know what he saw in me, but I was glad to get out of there.
translations.chinese: 我还是个孩子的时候，巴利蒙德把我从桂罗的孤儿院拉了出来。我不知道他看上了我哪一点，但我很高兴能离开那儿。

translations.english: I've spent years watching his techniques and learning his tricks. Sadly, I don't think I'll ever be as talented as he was.
translations.chinese: 多年来我一直在观察学习他的技巧。可惜我永远也不会有他那样的天赋。

translations.english: I was apprenticed to Balimund before he died. He taught me everything I know about forging armor and weapons.
translations.chinese: 巴利蒙德死前，我是他的学徒。他教会了我所有锻造盔甲武器的知识。

translations.english: She was responsible for the Empire's near collapse almost five hundred years ago. I believe I have a book about her...
translations.chinese: 大概在500年前，她害得帝国险些分崩离析。我还有本关于她的书……

translations.english: Ah Potema. Former queen of Solitude and one of the most dangerous necromancers in recorded history.
translations.chinese: 啊，波特玛。独孤城前太后，史上最危险的死灵法师之一。

translations.english: Oh ho. The whimpering Nord, eh? Yes, yes, I can see how you'd come to that conclusion. Interesting choice.
translations.chinese: 哦，杀了那个呜咽的诺德人啊？嗯，嗯，我明白你是怎么得出这个结论的。有趣的选择。

agentText:
Addon: Update

translations.english: Therefore, by my authority as Jarl, I pronounce you Thane of Riften and award you all of the benefits befitting your station. Congratulations.
translations.chinese: 因此，我以领主的名义，宣布你成为裂谷城武卫，并授予你一切与身份相称之福利。祝贺你了。

translations.english: You've been a beacon of hope in these dark times for my people and I will never forget it.
translations.chinese: 在这个黑暗的年代，你一直是我人民的希望之光，我永远不会忘记的。

translations.english: I should be the one thanking you. You've solved more problems in the short time you've been here then anyone in my court has their entire careers.
translations.chinese: 是我该感谢你才对。你在如此短短时间里解决的问题比我宫廷里所有人整个供职生涯都要多。

translations.english: I expect that you'll distance yourself from the affairs of state. In other words, keep your nose out of my business and we'll do just fine.
translations.chinese: 我希望你能远离领地的政务。换句话说，你别妨碍我的事，咱们就会相处愉快。

translations.english: Just remember that you're only a part of my court, this doesn't make you one of the family.
translations.chinese: 好好记得，你只是我宫廷的一员，不代表你是我家里人。

translations.english: I guess all that's left is to bestow the title. What were those words again?
translations.chinese: 我想剩下就是授予头衔了吧。还有什么来着？

translations.english: Doesn't matter... the title is yours. I henceforth name you Thane of Riften. Don't disappoint me.
translations.chinese: 算了……头衔归你了。从今以后，我任命你为裂谷城武卫。不要让我失望了。

translations.chinese: 就像穆月尔一样，你成为了我们领地的勇士，帮助别人克服困难，满足他们的需要。

translations.english: As the Jarl of Riften, I feel it's my duty to honor your selfless behavior by honoring you with the title Thane of Riften.
translations.chinese: 身为裂谷城领主，我觉得我有责任授予你裂谷城武卫的头衔来表彰你无私的行为。

translations.english: Oh don't pretend to be modest. I'm talking about your new role as champion. Apparently, you've taken my people under your wing.
translations.chinese: 别装孙子了。我说的是你作为勇士的新角色。你很明显已经把我下面的人置于自己的庇护下了。

translations.english: If you think you can steal my throne by winning the hearts of the people, that's where you're wrong. Keep that in mind.
translations.chinese: 如果你认为可以通过赢得民众的心来偷走我的宝座，那你就错了。好好记住。

translations.english: However, since it wouldn't behoove me to make you disappear, I'd rather have you on my side as Thane of Riften.
translations.chinese: 不过，既然我不该让你消失，那我宁愿让你站在我这边，做个裂谷城武卫吧。
